# Violations fixture

Index for the fixture repo; every doc except the orphan is reachable from here.

The governance gate treats duplicated guidance as a defect because two copies of one rule always drift apart, and an agent that retrieves the stale copy follows it with full confidence.

- [Agents entry point](AGENTS.md)
- [Broken things](docs/broken.md)
- [Structure problems](docs/structure.md)
- [Big doc](docs/big.md)
- [Heavy doc](docs/heavy.md)
- [Good doc](docs/good.md)
- [ADR-0001](docs/adr/ADR-0001.md)
- [ADR-0002](docs/adr/ADR-0002.md)
- [ADR-0003](docs/adr/ADR-0003.md)
- [Reference-linked doc][refdoc]
